notes: Build 2 part 2: the 'Planned to Savings — residue after investments' row had its OWN current-month formula (live salary − |CC| 'sweep everything', shown as the confusing ₹2.06L). This was the same consolidated-liquidity logic removed from the Savings-EOM row in v49. Now the current-month target uses the same formula as past/future months: surplus − scheduled investments − one-time investments. For the test data, June now shows '₹0 of ₹54.1K' instead of '₹0 of ₹2.06L', consistent with Net Surplus (₹87,613) above and the Savings-EOM chain below.
